properties.body:
[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 048/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC. LITHUANIAN COAST.
MILITARY EXERCISES 0600–1600 UTC DAILY
15–19 JUN IN AREA EYD-18, CENTERED
IN 55-29.6N 020-51.0E.
AREA TEMPORARILY DANGEROUS TO SHIPPING.
WIDE BERTH REQUESTED.
CANCEL THIS MSG 191700 UTC JUN 26.
